---
id: apple-native-payment

import MethodEndpoint from "@theme/ApiExplorer/MethodEndpoint";
import ParamsDetails from "@theme/ParamsDetails";
import RequestSchema from "@theme/RequestSchema";
import StatusCodes from "@theme/StatusCodes";
import OperationTabs from "@theme/OperationTabs";
import TabItem from "@theme/TabItem";
import Heading from "@theme/Heading";
import Translate from "@docusaurus/Translate";

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Native Payment API(Apple Pay)"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/b/pbl/v2/payment/apple-pay/"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Allows merchants to submit an Apple Pay payment directly via server-to-server integration. This endpoint requires private key authentication and expects a valid Apple Pay token structure in the request payload under `payload`. 

Typical use case: The merchant collects the Apple Pay token on their frontend and sends it to this endpoint along with session and amount information.
### Permissions

| Auth Method | Required Permissions |
|---|---|
| [API Key](/developers/getting-started/authentication/#api-key-auth) | All permissions (admin access) |
| [Basic Auth](/developers/getting-started/authentication/#basic-auth) | `Can add payment requests` or `Can add e-commerce payments` |

**Idempotency.** Pass an `Idempotency-Key` request header to make this charge safe to retry. If the same key was already recorded on the transaction by a previous **successful** charge, the request is rejected with `409 Conflict` **before any charge is attempted** — so a network retry can never double-charge the customer. The key is stored only after a successful charge, so retrying a **failed** charge with the same key is still allowed. Omitting the header preserves the original, non-idempotent behavior. See [Native Payments → Idempotency](/developers/payments/native-payments#idempotency) for the full contract.

<pre style={{display:"none"}}>{"curl --location 'https://sandbox.ottu.net/b/pbl/v2/payment/apple-pay/' \\\n--header 'Content-Type: application/json' \\\n--header 'Accept: application/json' \\\n--header 'Authorization: Api-Key YOUR_API_KEY' \\\n--data '{\n  \"payload\": {\n    \"paymentData\": {\n      \"version\": \"string\",\n      \"data\": \"string\",\n      \"signature\": \"string\",\n      \"header\": {\n        \"ephemeralPublicKey\": \"string\",\n        \"wrappedKey\": \"string\",\n        \"publicKeyHash\": \"string\",\n        \"transactionId\": \"string\"\n      }\n    },\n    \"paymentMethod\": {\n      \"displayName\": \"string\",\n      \"network\": \"string\",\n      \"type\": \"string\"\n    },\n    \"transactionIdentifier\": \"string\"\n  },\n  \"pg_code\": \"string\",\n  \"session_id\": \"string\"\n}'"}</pre>

  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
>
  <Translate id="theme.openapi.request.title">Request</Translate>
</Heading>
